name: neruva-record
summary: Auto-record AI agent activity into Neruva. v0.8.0: zero-config (default namespace claude_code, cwd:<repo> tag auto-added). Three install paths: Claude Code hook, claude-agent-sdk wrapper, Anthropic SDK wrapper. 14-pattern client-side secrets redaction. Substrate v0.5.7: tenant PII rules, typed-shape context, depth-unlimited nested-belief, deterministic bit-identical replay. Recalled-context prompt-injection guard.
